text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp, a period
of intense training during which racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Why don't we go put our
luggage away? ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Don't give me that! Get your butt over here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Plenty of open space for our meeting.
Looks like we made it here first.
choice_data_list:
So all that hurry was to be number one again,
huh?

So all that hurry was to be number one again,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course not, dummy. Sure, I like to be number one, but that's not the only reason I do things.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We've gotta talk strategy somewhere the others
won't overhear us, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now hurry up and come up with a plan! I want to
make the most of summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
There's a lights-out rule, but no curfew, so we can
keep training as late as we want.
choice_data_list: I'm not gonna let you overdo it.
I'm not gonna let you overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. I knew you were going to say that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins my summer camp with Daiwa
Scarlet!
